name: Host-Internal: LLM Reasoning Emission
description: Host-internal smoke fixture for the Postgres reference host. Exercises core.llm.chat with the stubbed AI proxy so the smoke test can assert canonical agent.reasoned + agent.decided emissions per run-event-payloads.schema.json §agentReasoned / §agentDecided. NOT loaded by the conformance suite — only by the postgres-host test/fixtures-private path via OPENWOP_EXTRA_FIXTURES_DIR.
